mapper.select: SELECT group_id AS groupId, min_role_to_create AS minRoleToCreate, requires_approval AS requiresApproval, def_manager_can_manage_schedule AS defManagerCanManageSchedule, requires_attendance_approval AS requiresAttendanceApproval, visibility_type AS visibilityType, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM group_schedule_policy WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
